Class Deck

java.lang.Object
edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Deck
public class Deck extends Object
Dynamic deck that draws from the top and receives cards at the bottom.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Deck()
    Creates an empty deck.
    Deck(Collection<Card> initialCards)
    Creates a deck with the provided cards.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addToBottom(Card card)
    Adds one card to the bottom of the deck.
    void
    addToBottom(Collection<Card> newCards)
    Adds several cards to the bottom of the deck preserving their order.
    Card
    draw()
    Draws a card from the top.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    Checks whether the deck has no cards.
    void
    shuffle(Random random)
    Shuffles the current deck.
    int
    size()
    Gets the number of cards in the deck.
    List<Card>
    snapshot()
    Returns a read-only snapshot of the deck order.
    static Deck
    standardShuffled(Random random)
    Builds a complete shuffled poker deck.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Deck

      public Deck()
      Creates an empty deck.

    • Deck

      public Deck(Collection<Card> initialCards)
      Creates a deck with the provided cards.
      Parameters:
      initialCards - cards to load in order

  • Method Details

    • standardShuffled

      public static Deck standardShuffled(Random random)
      Builds a complete shuffled poker deck.
      Parameters:
      random - random generator used for shuffling
      Returns:
      shuffled deck

    • draw

      public Card draw() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draws a card from the top.
      Returns:
      drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - when the deck has no cards

    • addToBottom

      public void addToBottom(Card card)
      Adds one card to the bottom of the deck.
      Parameters:
      card - card to add

    • addToBottom

      public void addToBottom(Collection<Card> newCards)
      Adds several cards to the bottom of the deck preserving their order.
      Parameters:
      newCards - cards to add

    • shuffle

      public void shuffle(Random random)
      Shuffles the current deck.
      Parameters:
      random - random generator used for shuffling

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Checks whether the deck has no cards.
      Returns:
      true when empty

    • size

      public int size()
      Gets the number of cards in the deck.
      Returns:
      deck size

    • snapshot

      public List<Card> snapshot()
      Returns a read-only snapshot of the deck order.
      Returns:
      deck cards snapshot
